page: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz. The server features 8 dedicated vCPUs, consisting of 4 physical cores with 2 threads per core, and a large 480 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance includes 472 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include any dedicated GPUs. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data shows strong single-threaded performance, with gzip compression reaching 35.05 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression reaching 15.08 GB/sec, both placing in the top 10% tier. Small-model LLM inference text generation is also strong at 270.06 tokens/sec. Other performance metrics, including multi-core stress-ng, memory bandwidth, and Redis operations, fall within the average range.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D8ds_v7 offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon compute, fast single-threaded execution, and bundled local storage makes this server well-suited for web serving, database operations, medium-scale application hosting, and lightweight text processing or inference tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure D8ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C x86_64 processor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 472 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server delivers a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier single-threaded capabilities, with gzip compression and bzip3 decompression placing in the top 10% tier, alongside strong text generation speeds for small language models. Most other compute, memory, and database benchmarks perform in the average range. Lacking a GPU, this instance relies on its high-frequency 4.2 GHz CPU and 480 MB L3 cache for processing. It represents a resource-dense, cost-effective option for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, database operations, and application hosting requiring fast single-core execution and local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v7 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine featuring 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 472 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-threaded compression performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v7 is an 8-vCPU general-purpose server with 32 GB RAM, 472 GB local storage, and an Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processing, bundled local storage, and exceptional single-threaded performance.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor at 4.2 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory and 472 GB of bundled local storage
Top-tier single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression performance
Premium Storage capable for flexible, high-performance disk configurations
Suitable for web serving, database operations, and general-purpose application hosting
